summary.en: A simple bookkeeping app helping Pakistan's micro-SMEs run their finances digitally.
summary.zh: 一款簡單的記帳應用程式，協助巴基斯坦的微型中小企業以數位方式管理財務。

highlight.en: Positioned as Khatabook/OkCredit for Pakistan, it digitizes store credit, sales, inventory and cash for the ~30M small businesses driving 74% of GDP.
highlight.zh: 定位為巴基斯坦版的 Khatabook／OkCredit，將賒帳、銷售、庫存與現金管理數位化，服務貢獻全國 74% GDP 的約 3000 萬家小型企業。

summary.en: Authorization infrastructure that secures applications at companies like OpenAI and Zoom.
summary.zh: 為 OpenAI、Zoom 等公司的應用程式提供安全保障的授權基礎設施。

highlight.en: Founded by three ex-Red Hat leaders who previously built Quay, it gives companies performant, scalable authorization tooling for their applications.
highlight.zh: 由三位前 Red Hat 主管創立，他們先前打造了 Quay；公司為企業應用程式提供高效能、可擴展的授權工具。

summary.en: AI-powered customer service built for startups.
summary.zh: 專為新創公司打造的 AI 客戶服務。

highlight.en: Its GPT-based agent claudIA integrates with existing systems to automate 55-90% of support tickets while preserving service quality.
highlight.zh: 其基於 GPT 的客服代理 claudIA 可整合既有系統，在維持服務品質的同時自動處理 55% 至 90% 的客服工單。

summary.en: A next-generation Minecraft with generative-AI building and massive multiplayer.
summary.zh: 結合生成式 AI 建造與大規模多人連線的次世代 Minecraft。

highlight.en: A 3D user-generated-content platform with one of the largest multiplayer capacities ever built, targeting 13-40 year-olds who outgrew Roblox and Minecraft.
highlight.zh: 一個 3D 使用者生成內容平台，擁有史上數一數二的多人連線承載量，鎖定已不再玩 Roblox 與 Minecraft 的 13 至 40 歲族群。

summary.en: An AI-native sales outreach platform that runs your entire top-of-funnel.
summary.zh: 一個 AI 原生的銷售開發平台，全程接管你的銷售漏斗頂端。

highlight.en: It automates everything from prospect research to outreach, freeing sales teams to focus only on the conversations that convert.
highlight.zh: 從潛在客戶研究到主動接洽全程自動化，讓銷售團隊只需專注於能促成成交的對話。

summary.en: Affordable life and health insurance for the next billion Indians.
summary.zh: 為下一個十億印度人提供平價的人壽與健康保險。

highlight.en: It targets financial security for 150M vulnerable households via contextual insurance, addressing an $8B market enabled by India's mobile and digital growth.
highlight.zh: 透過情境化保險產品為 1.5 億弱勢家庭提供財務保障，瞄準因印度行動與數位基礎設施成長而開啟的 80 億美元市場。

summary.en: Software for diagnostic medical laboratories and clinics.
summary.zh: 為診斷醫療實驗室與診所打造的軟體。

highlight.en: It bundles cashier, booking, clinical-instrument and imaging integrations, automatic result generation, and secure result sharing for regulatory compliance.
highlight.zh: 整合收銀、預約、臨床儀器與影像設備、自動產生檢驗結果，以及符合法規的安全結果分享功能。

summary.en: An all-in-one restaurant solution for ordering via WhatsApp, plus POS and CRM.
summary.zh: 一站式餐廳解決方案，整合 WhatsApp 點餐、POS 與 CRM。

highlight.en: It lets mass-market Latam restaurants build a digital menu and take WhatsApp orders in one click, serving 40,000+ restaurants and lifting their sales by 40%.
highlight.zh: 讓拉美大眾市場餐廳一鍵建立數位菜單並透過 WhatsApp 接單，已服務逾 4 萬家餐廳，使其銷售額提升 40%。

summary.en: AI-powered animal diagnostics for veterinarians.
summary.zh: 為獸醫提供的 AI 驅動動物診斷。

highlight.en: It applies AI to deliver more accurate and more affordable diagnostics to veterinary practices.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 為獸醫診所提供更準確且更實惠的診斷服務。

summary.en: A generative-AI platform that acts as Shopify for home-service professionals.
summary.zh: 一個生成式 AI 平台，扮演居家服務專業人員的 Shopify。

highlight.en: Its AI quickly builds a custom SEO-optimized website, syncs local listings, automates social media, and lets home-service businesses get paid online.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 可快速建立客製化、SEO 優化的網站，同步本地商家名錄、自動化社群媒體，並讓居家服務業者在線收款。

summary.en: An IT documentation platform for organizing and sharing technical information.
summary.zh: 一個用於整理與分享技術資訊的 IT 文件平台。

highlight.en: It consolidates passwords, network documentation and business processes into one secure, customizable interface, replacing multiple complex tools for IT teams.
highlight.zh: 將密碼、網路文件與業務流程整合到單一安全、可客製化的介面中，取代 IT 團隊原本使用的多套複雜工具。

summary.en: SpruceID lets users control their own data across the web.
summary.zh: SpruceID 讓使用者掌控自己在網路上的資料。

highlight.en: It inverts the login model so platforms sign into people's data vaults, building digital-wallet ecosystems for governments, enterprises, and blockchains.
highlight.zh: 翻轉登入模式，讓平台登入使用者的資料保險庫，並為政府、企業與區塊鏈打造數位錢包生態系。

summary.en: Driverless electric vehicles at a fraction of the cost of a car.
summary.zh: 以遠低於汽車成本提供的無人駕駛電動車。

highlight.en: A pioneer in supervised autonomous mobility, Faction developed right-sized driverless vehicle fleets focused on sustainability and safety.
highlight.zh: 作為監督式自動駕駛移動領域的先驅，Faction 開發了大小合宜的無人駕駛車隊，著重永續與安全。

summary.en: An AI operating system for cafés, bakeries, and restaurant franchises.
summary.zh: 為咖啡館、烘焙坊與餐廳連鎖打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Built on Square, its AI agents act as a CTO, CMO and COO to build branded apps and automate ordering, loyalty and operations for 800+ brands.
highlight.zh: 建構於 Square 之上，其 AI 代理扮演 CTO、CMO 與 COO，為逾 800 個品牌打造品牌應用程式並自動化點餐、會員與營運。

summary.en: Fulfillment by Amazon for African merchants.
summary.zh: 為非洲商家打造的亞馬遜物流（FBA）模式服務。

highlight.en: It handles local and international fulfillment for over 7,500 small e-commerce and social-media merchants within Nigeria.
highlight.zh: 為奈及利亞境內逾 7,500 家小型電商與社群媒體商家處理本地及國際物流。

summary.en: Solo helps Americans respond to debt lawsuits and settle their debt.
summary.zh: Solo 協助美國人回應債務訴訟並和解債務。

highlight.en: Users respond to debt lawsuits with SoloSuit, then settle directly with collectors via SoloSettle, targeting the $35B debt-resolution market.
highlight.zh: 使用者透過 SoloSuit 回應債務訴訟，再以 SoloSettle 直接與催收方和解，瞄準 350 億美元的債務解決市場。

summary.en: India's first and only marriage super app, run by the individuals themselves.
summary.zh: 印度首個也是唯一的婚姻超級應用程式，由當事人自己主導。

highlight.en: It offers end-to-end matchmaking, courtship and wedding products for urban professionals, with patented one-click matching it claims is faster than Tinder.
highlight.zh: 為都市專業人士提供從配對、交往到婚禮的端到端產品，並擁有號稱比 Tinder 更快的專利一鍵配對技術。

summary.en: A tool to design and collaborate in 3D across multiple platforms.
summary.zh: 一款可在多平台上進行 3D 設計與協作的工具。

highlight.en: It lets teams easily create, iterate on, and publish production-ready 3D content for multiple platforms.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊輕鬆建立、迭代並發布可直接投入生產的多平台 3D 內容。

summary.en: Automated user acquisition and selling on WhatsApp for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業在 WhatsApp 上提供自動化的用戶獲取與銷售。

highlight.en: It helps Indian D2C brands and SMBs acquire customers and sell via a WhatsApp commerce bot offering attribution-based marketing and vernacular-language support.
highlight.zh: 透過具歸因行銷與本地語言支援的 WhatsApp 商務機器人，協助印度 D2C 品牌與中小企業獲取顧客並銷售。

summary.en: Source better custom parts by partnering directly with vetted manufacturers.
summary.zh: 直接與經審核的製造商合作，採購更優質的客製化零件。

highlight.en: Used by engineers and supply-chain managers at NASA, Siemens, Tesla and Google to source high-quality, cost-competitive custom parts faster.
highlight.zh: NASA、西門子、特斯拉與 Google 的工程師與供應鏈經理皆使用它，更快採購到高品質、具成本競爭力的客製化零件。

summary.en: An API for developers to access health data from apps, wearables and devices.
summary.zh: 讓開發者存取應用程式、穿戴裝置與設備健康數據的 API。

highlight.en: Its unified API makes it easy to transfer and access data from health apps, wearables, sensors and medical equipment through a single source.
highlight.zh: 其統一 API 讓開發者能透過單一來源輕鬆傳輸並存取健康應用程式、穿戴裝置、感測器與醫療設備的數據。

summary.en: A digital bank for small businesses and entrepreneurs in the Philippines.
summary.zh: 為菲律賓小型企業與創業者打造的數位銀行。

highlight.en: It lets small businesses send invoices, collect payments, run payroll and pay bills without the setup fees or balance requirements demanded by Filipino banks.
highlight.zh: 讓小型企業開立發票、收款、發放薪資與支付帳單，並免除菲律賓銀行通常要求的開戶費與最低餘額。

summary.en: An AI-powered compliance platform for PCI 4, CCPA, HIPAA and 50+ laws.
summary.zh: 一個 AI 驅動的合規平台，涵蓋 PCI 4、CCPA、HIPAA 等 50 多項法規。

highlight.en: It helps B2B websites easily achieve and maintain compliance with PCI DSS 4.0.1, CCPA, CIPA, HIPAA and 50+ data-privacy regulations.
highlight.zh: 協助 B2B 網站輕鬆達成並維持 PCI DSS 4.0.1、CCPA、CIPA、HIPAA 及 50 多項資料隱私法規的合規。

summary.en: Use your credit card to pay, get paid, and extend cash flow in Latin America.
summary.zh: 在拉丁美洲運用信用卡支付、收款並延長現金流。

highlight.en: It lets businesses pay rent, taxes, payroll and suppliers by credit card for a 4.7% fee, with 3-12 month installments and no underwriting risk taken on.
highlight.zh: 讓企業以信用卡支付租金、稅金、薪資與供應商款項，收取 4.7% 手續費，提供 3 至 12 個月分期且不承擔承保風險。

summary.en: Procure-to-pay purchasing and accounts-payable software for mid-size companies.
summary.zh: 為中型企業提供採購到付款（Procure-to-Pay）的採購與應付帳款軟體。

highlight.en: It automates procurement and AP with purchase requests, approvals, POs and bill payments, syncing with ERPs like QuickBooks and NetSuite.
highlight.zh: 以採購申請、審批、採購單與帳單付款自動化採購與應付帳款流程，並可與 QuickBooks、NetSuite 等 ERP 同步。

summary.en: Generative-AI automation for healthcare medical coding.
summary.zh: 為醫療編碼提供的生成式 AI 自動化。

highlight.en: Datrics HCP uses AI to streamline health-insurance claims, improving accuracy, cutting processing time and eliminating costly errors.
highlight.zh: Datrics HCP 運用 AI 簡化健康保險理賠流程，提升準確度、縮短處理時間並消除代價高昂的錯誤。

summary.en: A no-code platform for enterprise software companies to build apps fast.
summary.zh: 讓企業軟體公司快速建構應用程式的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: It lets developers and designers build production applications at the speed of thought, described as a cross between Unity and Figma.
highlight.zh: 讓開發者與設計師以思考的速度建構正式應用程式，被形容為 Unity 與 Figma 的結合體。

summary.en: Easier and more reliable mobile app releases for teams.
summary.zh: 為團隊帶來更輕鬆、更可靠的行動應用程式發布。

highlight.en: Runway streamlines the mobile app release process so teams can ship updates more easily and reliably.
highlight.zh: Runway 簡化行動應用程式的發布流程，讓團隊能更輕鬆、更可靠地推出更新。

summary.en: An AI-powered video platform for internal comms and HR teams.
summary.zh: 為內部溝通與人資團隊打造的 AI 影片平台。

highlight.en: It lets People and Comms teams make engaging employee-led videos with no editing skills and share them on Slack, Teams, LMS, intranet or job offers.
highlight.zh: 讓人資與溝通團隊無需剪輯技巧即可製作以員工為主角的吸睛影片，並分享至 Slack、Teams、學習系統、內網或錄取信。

summary.en: A virtual food hall that delivers many cuisines in one order.
summary.zh: 一個可在單筆訂單中外送多種料理的虛擬美食街。

highlight.en: A ghost kitchen styled like an upscale food court, it lets families order from 8-15 different restaurants all in a single delivery order.
highlight.zh: 一個風格如高檔美食街的幽靈廚房，讓家庭能在單筆外送訂單中向 8 至 15 家不同餐廳點餐。

summary.en: A skill-tech platform running tech placement bootcamps with income sharing.
summary.zh: 一個以收入共享模式經營技術就業訓練營的技能科技平台。

highlight.en: It trains top tech talent with zero upfront fees and places them at partner companies, with special support for women and unemployed youth in India.
highlight.zh: 以零預付費用培訓頂尖技術人才並安排至合作企業，並為印度的女性與失業青年提供經濟與社會層面的特別協助。

summary.en: A next-generation care enablement platform for healthcare teams.
summary.zh: 為醫療團隊打造的次世代照護賦能平台。

highlight.en: It combines online consultation with productivity tools in a real-time multiplayer dashboard, aiming to get patients optimal care within 24 hours.
highlight.zh: 在即時多人協作儀表板中結合線上問診與生產力工具，目標是在 24 小時內讓病患獲得最佳照護。

summary.en: Personalized rent-to-own real-estate financing for Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為東南亞提供個人化的「先租後買」房地產融資。

highlight.en: Founded in Singapore in 2019, it offers rent-to-own financing as an alternative to the region's inflexible 12%+ mortgages, backed by YC and industry veterans.
highlight.zh: 2019 年成立於新加坡，提供「先租後買」融資，作為當地利率高於 12% 的僵化房貸替代方案，並獲 YC 與多家房地產融資資深人士支持。

summary.en: Shift FinOps left to proactively find and fix cloud cost issues.
summary.zh: 將 FinOps 左移，主動發現並修正雲端成本問題。

highlight.en: It sits in CI/CD to show the cost impact of infrastructure-as-code changes before deployment, catching costly mistakes and enforcing FinOps policies.
highlight.zh: 嵌入 CI/CD 流程，在部署前顯示基礎設施即程式碼（IaC）變更的成本影響，及早攔截代價高昂的錯誤並執行標籤與 FinOps 政策。

summary.en: A payments solution for small-scale construction companies.
summary.zh: 為小型營造公司打造的支付解決方案。

highlight.en: It eases cash-flow strain from slow payments via low-cost deposit options, project working capital, streamlined subcontractor payouts and lower collection risk.
highlight.zh: 以低成本訂金方案、專案營運資金、簡化的轉包商付款與降低的收款風險，緩解小型營造商因付款緩慢造成的現金流壓力。

summary.en: Building Chime for India, a credit-building platform for the next billion users.
summary.zh: 打造印度版的 Chime，為下一個十億用戶提供信用建立平台。

highlight.en: It offers a credit-building platform with a digital credit card delivered over India's UPI payment rails.
highlight.zh: 提供信用建立平台，透過印度的 UPI 支付軌道發行數位信用卡。

summary.en: A WhatsApp commerce platform for Shopify merchants.
summary.zh: 為 Shopify 商家打造的 WhatsApp 商務平台。

highlight.en: It integrates WhatsApp commerce with Shopify so merchants can sell where customers chat, tapping a channel where 175M people message businesses daily.
highlight.zh: 將 WhatsApp 商務與 Shopify 整合，讓商家在顧客聊天之處銷售，切入每日有 1.75 億人向企業發訊息的通路。

summary.en: Embed natural-language-to-SQL into your product.
summary.zh: 將自然語言轉 SQL 嵌入你的產品。

highlight.en: Built on an LLM, its NL-to-SQL API lets your users run no-code analytics, pull reports and answer data questions using plain natural language.
highlight.zh: 基於大型語言模型，其 NL-to-SQL API 讓使用者以純自然語言進行無程式碼分析、產生報表並回答資料問題。

summary.en: An all-in-one financial operating platform for hospitality managers.
summary.zh: 為旅宿管理者打造的一站式財務作業平台。

highlight.en: Topkey simplifies expense management for hospitality managers in a single financial operating platform.
highlight.zh: Topkey 以單一財務作業平台簡化旅宿管理者的費用管理。

summary.en: Global, compliant verification of education, employment and loyalty.
summary.zh: 全球且合規的教育、就業與會員身分驗證。

highlight.en: It claims industry-leading 45%+ conversion with global, fully private verification, using cryptography that keeps user data unseen and resists AI-driven fraud.
highlight.zh: 以全球、完全保密的驗證號稱業界領先的 45% 以上轉換率，運用密碼學使用戶資料無人可見並抵禦 AI 驅動的詐欺。

summary.en: A payroll app paying retail and factory workers daily across Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 一款讓東南亞零售與工廠工人每日領薪的薪資應用程式。

highlight.en: Its income-streaming app pays workers daily, not monthly, and integrates with any HRM/attendance software, helping employers cut turnover and rival gig work.
highlight.zh: 其薪資串流應用程式讓工人改為每日（而非每月）領薪，並可整合任何人資／出勤軟體，協助雇主降低流動率並與零工經濟競爭。

summary.en: GimBooks makes bookkeeping easy for small business owners.
summary.zh: GimBooks 讓小型企業主輕鬆記帳。

highlight.en: A cloud-based, mobile-first bookkeeping and business platform for India's small and micro businesses, with domain-specific books and integrated banking.
highlight.zh: 一個雲端、行動優先的記帳與企業管理平台，專為印度小型與微型企業設計，提供領域化記帳與整合式銀行服務。

summary.en: Curated, evidence-based answers to any clinical question.
summary.zh: 針對任何臨床問題提供精選、實證為基礎的解答。

highlight.en: Hospitals outsource the clinical questions doctors ask of pharmacists to InpharmD, which answers them more efficiently than in-house teams.
highlight.zh: 醫院將醫師向藥師提出的臨床問題外包給 InpharmD，由其比院內團隊更有效率地解答。

summary.en: AI workers for the logistics industry.
summary.zh: 為物流產業打造的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Arnata builds AI workers designed to handle tasks across the logistics industry.
highlight.zh: Arnata 打造能在物流產業中處理各項工作的 AI 員工。

summary.en: ModernLoop helps teams automate and streamline recruiting operations.
summary.zh: ModernLoop 協助團隊自動化並簡化招募作業。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-Facebook, Slack and Brex leaders, it automates interview coordination across teams to give a strong candidate experience amid a talent shortage.
highlight.zh: 由前 Facebook、Slack 與 Brex 主管創立，在全球人才短缺下自動化跨團隊的面試協調，提供一流的求職者體驗。

summary.en: Discovering bispecific antibody-drug conjugates (BsADC) against cancer.
summary.zh: 開發對抗癌症的雙特異性抗體藥物複合體（BsADC）。

highlight.en: It generates complex next-gen antibody therapeutics, combining bi-/multispecificity, multivalency and drug-conjugation in one process, focused on solid tumours.
highlight.zh: 開發複雜的次世代抗體療法，在單一流程中結合雙／多特異性、多價性與藥物複合，專注於免疫療法難以處理的實體腫瘤。

summary.en: Debt as a service so companies can lend to their users at scale.
summary.zh: 以「債務即服務」讓公司能大規模地向用戶放款。

highlight.en: Described as Stripe for Debt, its API and risk protocol let fintechs and gig platforms lend to users without spending up to two years raising debt.
highlight.zh: 被形容為「債務界的 Stripe」，其 API 與風險協定讓金融科技與零工平台無需耗時兩年募集債務即可向用戶放款。

summary.en: An online therapy platform for the Spanish-speaking market.
summary.zh: 為西語市場打造的線上心理治療平台。

highlight.en: It provides on-demand mental healthcare for individuals and businesses, with users in more than 45 countries attending therapy on a recurring monthly basis.
highlight.zh: 為個人與企業提供隨選心理醫療服務，逾 45 個國家的使用者每月固定進行治療。

summary.en: Build identity verification workflows the way you want.
summary.zh: 依你的需求建立身分驗證流程。

highlight.en: It processes 5M+ KYCs per month for 35+ Indian companies including leading banks and fintechs, cutting onboarding time by 5x and costs by over 80%.
highlight.zh: 每月為包含頂尖銀行與金融科技在內的逾 35 家印度公司處理超過 500 萬筆 KYC，使開戶速度提升 5 倍、成本降低逾 80%。

summary.en: Handling the burdensome paperwork for expensive specialty drugs.
summary.zh: 代為處理昂貴特殊藥物繁瑣的文書作業。

highlight.en: For drugs averaging $70,000 per patient yearly, it uses AI to cut weeks of manual workflow so specialty pharmacies and hospitals get patients on therapy fast.
highlight.zh: 針對每位病患每年平均花費 7 萬美元的藥物，運用 AI 縮短長達數週的人工流程，讓特殊藥局與醫院迅速讓病患開始治療。

summary.en: Shopify for LatAm, easy e-commerce tools for local businesses.
summary.zh: 拉美版的 Shopify，為本地企業提供簡易電商工具。

highlight.en: Its no-code, no-design onboarding lets local LatAm businesses set up an online store and start selling in under 30 seconds.
highlight.zh: 其無程式碼、無設計的引導流程，讓拉美本地企業在 30 秒內建好線上商店並開始銷售。

summary.en: An online school delivering K-12 education across Africa.
summary.zh: 在非洲提供 K-12 教育的線上學校。

highlight.en: With 5:1 student-teacher ratios, it teaches the same rigorous international curriculum as private schools at a fraction of their up-to-$7,500 annual fees.
highlight.zh: 以 5:1 的師生比，提供與私立學校相同嚴謹的國際課程，學費卻僅為其每年最高 7,500 美元的一小部分。

summary.en: Foster offers a better way to write through a community-powered workflow.
summary.zh: Foster 透過社群驅動的工作流程，提供更好的寫作方式。

highlight.en: It powers a writing workflow driven by some of the internet's best writers, editors and experts.
highlight.zh: 由網路上一些頂尖的作家、編輯與專家驅動，支撐起一套寫作工作流程。

summary.en: Making restaurants more data-driven.
summary.zh: 讓餐廳更以數據為導向。

highlight.en: Its proprietary visualization tools and data science give restaurant execs and managers insights to make real-time decisions and grow online sales.
highlight.zh: 其專有的視覺化工具與資料科學，讓餐飲主管與經理人取得業務洞察，即時決策並提升線上銷售。

summary.en: Connecting low-income high-school students with free 24/7 online tutoring.
summary.zh: 為低收入高中生連結免費、全天候的線上輔導。

highlight.en: An edtech nonprofit, it pairs students with live volunteer tutors in under five minutes and has matched 100,000+ requests to democratize academic support.
highlight.zh: 作為教育科技非營利組織，它在五分鐘內為學生配對線上志工家教，已媒合逾 10 萬筆請求，致力於使學業支援普及化。

summary.en: Scheduling and workforce-management SaaS for home healthcare providers.
summary.zh: 為居家醫療服務商打造的排程與人力管理 SaaS。

highlight.en: It combines a clinician app, ops dashboard, proprietary logistics algorithms and EMR integrations, accessible via API, to optimize scheduling and dispatch.
highlight.zh: 整合臨床人員應用程式、營運儀表板、專有物流演算法與電子病歷介接，並可透過 API 模組化存取，以最佳化排程與派遣。

summary.en: Digital sales rooms for B2B sales, marketing and customer teams (acquired by MindTickle).
summary.zh: 為 B2B 銷售、行銷與客戶團隊打造的數位銷售室（已被 MindTickle 收購）。

highlight.en: It gives customer-facing teams one workspace to capture demos and content, auto-organize it by deal context, and build AI-targeted personalized deal rooms.
highlight.zh: 讓面向客戶的團隊在單一工作空間中蒐集示範與內容、依交易情境自動整理，並建立 AI 鎖定的個人化交易室。

summary.en: Compliant crypto and banking infrastructure delivered as a single set of APIs.
summary.zh: 以單一組 API 提供的合規加密貨幣與銀行基礎設施。

highlight.en: It bundles crypto custody, trading, card issuing and banking behind one API and contract, handling security and regulatory compliance across 30 countries.
highlight.zh: 以單一 API 與合約整合加密貨幣託管、交易、發卡與銀行服務，並在 30 個國家處理安全與法規合規。

summary.en: A growth automation platform for Amazon sellers.
summary.zh: 為亞馬遜賣家打造的成長自動化平台。

highlight.en: It uses data-driven automation starting with advertising and inventory to help Amazon sellers accelerate brand growth.
highlight.zh: 以資料驅動的自動化，從廣告與庫存著手，協助亞馬遜賣家加速品牌成長。

summary.en: The leading online marketplace for formalwear.
summary.zh: 領先的正式服飾線上交易市集。

highlight.en: Available on iOS, Android and web, it pairs technology and white-glove service with logistics; its founders made the Forbes 30 Under 30 Art and Style cover.
highlight.zh: 於 iOS、Android 與網頁版上線，結合技術、貴賓級服務與物流；其共同創辦人曾登上《富比士》30 Under 30 藝術與時尚封面。

summary.en: Track AI-generated code from commit to production.
summary.zh: 追蹤 AI 生成的程式碼，從提交到上線。

highlight.en: Its AI Checkpoints capture which agent wrote each change, tokens, cost per PR and deployment, letting leaders compare Copilot, Cursor and Claude Code fairly.
highlight.zh: 其 AI Checkpoints 記錄每項變更由哪個代理撰寫、token、每個 PR 的成本與部署情形，讓主管以實際成果比較 Copilot、Cursor 與 Claude Code。

summary.en: Buy Now, Pay Later and cash advance for household essentials, with no fees.
summary.zh: 為居家必需品提供零手續費的「先買後付」與現金預支。

highlight.en: It charges no interest, late, transfer or service fees, and unlocks free cash-advance transfers for users who shop with its BNPL.
highlight.zh: 不收取利息、逾期費、轉帳費或服務費，並讓使用其「先買後付」的用戶解鎖免費的現金預支轉帳。

summary.en: Dramatically better search and ads for marketplaces.
summary.zh: 為交易市集提供大幅優化的搜尋與廣告。

highlight.en: Built by ex-Google, Meta and Pinterest ads engineers, it unifies search, native ads and feed ranking for marketplaces like Eventbrite, Upwork and Outschool.
highlight.zh: 由前 Google、Meta 與 Pinterest 廣告工程師打造，為 Eventbrite、Upwork、Outschool 等市集統一搜尋、原生廣告與動態排序。

summary.en: Automated investing built for the next generation.
summary.zh: 為新世代打造的自動化投資。

highlight.en: Alinea is an app for new investors that does the hard work for them, putting a team of investment experts in their pocket.
highlight.zh: Alinea 是一款為新手投資人設計的應用程式，代為處理繁重工作，等於把投資專家團隊放進口袋。

summary.en: WeWeb is a no-code front-end builder that connects with any back-end.
summary.zh: WeWeb 是可連接任何後端的無程式碼前端建構工具。

highlight.en: It builds pixel-perfect frontends on existing databases and auth, allows custom code or Vue.js components, and exports a portable PWA-ready app, no lock-in.
highlight.zh: 在既有資料庫與驗證系統上建構像素級精準的前端，可加入自訂程式碼或 Vue.js 元件，並匯出可自行部署、無廠商鎖定的 PWA 應用程式。

summary.en: A telemedicine platform for chronic conditions like obesity.
summary.zh: 針對肥胖等慢性病的遠距醫療平台。

highlight.en: It helps people with chronic conditions access affordable care via telemedicine, serving thousands of customers across the US.
highlight.zh: 透過遠距醫療協助慢性病患者取得平價照護，已服務全美數千名客戶。

summary.en: Providing clean, safe, virus-free air for homes, buildings and cars.
summary.zh: 為住家、建築與車輛提供潔淨、安全、無病毒的空氣。

highlight.en: Its air purifiers and filters are independently lab-tested, EPA-certified and FDA-registered to eliminate COVID-19 and most other viruses and bacteria.
highlight.zh: 其空氣清淨機與濾網經獨立實驗室測試、EPA 認證與 FDA 註冊，可消除新冠病毒與大多數其他病毒與細菌。

summary.en: A risk decisioning platform for assessing customer creditworthiness.
summary.zh: 一個用於評估客戶信用度的風險決策平台。

highlight.en: It provides modular components that let companies quickly build a complete credit-underwriting infrastructure and monitor creditworthiness over time.
highlight.zh: 提供模組化元件，讓企業快速建構完整的信用承保基礎設施，並持續監控客戶的信用度。

summary.en: Bringing the joy of cycling to millions of Indians.
summary.zh: 將騎乘自行車的樂趣帶給數百萬印度人。

highlight.en: It lets people buy or share its bicycles and e-bikes for health, fitness and mobility, now in hundreds of communities across Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi and Pune.
highlight.zh: 讓人們購買或共享其自行車與電動自行車以促進健康、健身與通勤，目前遍布班加羅爾、孟買、德里 NCR 與浦那的數百個社區。

summary.en: A modern, open-source, self-hosted AI customer support platform.
summary.zh: 一個現代、開源、可自架的 AI 客戶支援平台。

highlight.en: An open-source alternative to Intercom and Zendesk, it unifies email, live chat, social media and WhatsApp conversations in one self-hosted platform.
highlight.zh: 作為 Intercom 與 Zendesk 的開源替代品，將電子郵件、即時聊天、社群媒體與 WhatsApp 對話整合於單一可自架平台。

summary.en: A marketplace for buying and selling construction machines.
summary.zh: 一個買賣工程機械的交易市集。

highlight.en: Its inspection app captures machine-condition data so owners can sell effortlessly and receive the best offers from international used dealers within days.
highlight.zh: 其檢測應用程式蒐集機械狀況的所有相關數據，讓機主能輕鬆出售，並在數日內收到國際二手經銷商的最佳報價。

summary.en: An enterprise-ready webhooks service, open-source and in the cloud.
summary.zh: 一個企業級的 webhook 服務，開源且提供雲端版本。

highlight.en: It turns webhook deliverability, retries, monitoring and security into one API call, sending billions of webhooks for startups and Fortune 500 customers alike.
highlight.zh: 將 webhook 的送達、重試、監控與安全簡化為單一 API 呼叫，為從新創到財星 500 大的客戶傳送數十億個 webhook。

summary.en: A dermatology telehealth app for Latin America.
summary.zh: 一款服務拉丁美洲的皮膚科遠距醫療應用程式。

highlight.en: It runs a virtual dermatology clinic where doctors consult, prescribe and ship treatment to the door, addressing Mexico's ratio of one dermatologist per 50,000.
highlight.zh: 經營虛擬皮膚科診所，由醫師問診、開立處方並將療程寄送到府，因應墨西哥每 5 萬人僅 1 名皮膚科醫師的現況。

summary.en: Buy Now, Pay Later for Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為東南亞打造的「先買後付」服務。

highlight.en: It offers instant 0% interest loans so consumers can renovate homes or buy furniture online with an extended budget and pay later at no extra cost.
highlight.zh: 提供即時 0% 利率貸款，讓消費者能以延展的預算在線整修住家或購買家具，並可日後無額外費用付款。

summary.en: The financial layer for decentralized AI.
summary.zh: 去中心化 AI 的金融層。

highlight.en: TaoFi is building the financial layer for the decentralized AI ecosystem.
highlight.zh: TaoFi 正為去中心化 AI 生態系建構金融層。

summary.en: A low-latency API to run and deploy machine-learning models.
summary.zh: 一個低延遲的 API，用於執行與部署機器學習模型。

highlight.en: Its Python SDK turns any model into an endpoint and handles routing, multi-cloud scaling, caching and GPU optimization without needing MLOps engineers.
highlight.zh: 其 Python SDK 可將任何模型轉為端點，並處理路由、多雲擴展、快取與 GPU 最佳化，無需 MLOps 工程師團隊。

summary.en: A global card-issuing and payment-processing engine.
summary.zh: 一個全球發卡與支付處理引擎。

highlight.en: Its P1 engine offers fast, lean global card issuing and payment processing for businesses.
highlight.zh: 其 P1 引擎為企業提供快速、精簡的全球發卡與支付處理。

summary.en: Building satellites to image everywhere on Earth, every 15 minutes.
summary.zh: 打造能每 15 分鐘為地球各地拍攝影像的衛星。

highlight.en: It is building the world's largest earth-observation constellation and has launched 62 satellites, more than all other YC companies combined, with $85M+ booked.
highlight.zh: 正打造全球最大的對地觀測衛星星系，已發射 62 顆衛星，數量超過所有其他 YC 公司的總和，並簽下逾 8,500 萬美元的意向書。

summary.en: Wyndly fixes allergies by training the body to ignore its triggers.
summary.zh: Wyndly 透過訓練身體忽略過敏原來根治過敏。

highlight.en: It expands access to sublingual immunotherapy via telehealth, diagnosing each patient's allergy profile and creating a personalized plan for lifelong relief.
highlight.zh: 透過遠距醫療擴大舌下免疫療法的可及性，診斷每位病患的過敏特徵並制定個人化方案，提供終身緩解。

summary.en: AI-powered corporate training that is faster, smarter and more effective.
summary.zh: 更快速、更聰明、更有效的 AI 驅動企業培訓。

highlight.en: Its Ostronaut SaaS builds on six years and 10,000+ trained product professionals from Pragmatic Leaders to transform workforce learning as an MBA alternative.
highlight.zh: 其 Ostronaut SaaS 奠基於 Pragmatic Leaders 六年來培訓逾 1 萬名產品專業人士的經驗，作為 MBA 替代方案革新企業學習。

summary.en: A place where motivated investors and entrepreneurs co-own assets together.
summary.zh: 一個讓積極的投資人與創業者共同持有資產的平台。

highlight.en: Fractional enables motivated investors and entrepreneurs to co-own assets together.
highlight.zh: Fractional 讓積極的投資人與創業者能共同持有資產。

summary.en: Procure the right software 5x faster.
summary.zh: 以 5 倍速度採購到合適的軟體。

highlight.en: It is a marketplace that accelerates software procurement for teams while giving organizations control over the entire purchasing process.
highlight.zh: 它是一個交易市集，加速團隊的軟體採購，同時讓組織掌控整個採購流程。

summary.en: Discover social-video trends as they happen.
summary.zh: 在社群影音趨勢發生的當下即時掌握。

highlight.en: Its engine analyzed over a billion social-video posts to decode virality; after reaching profitability in 12 months, it was acquired by TikTok partner Collab.
highlight.zh: 其引擎已分析逾 10 億則社群影音貼文以解析爆紅機制；在 12 個月內達到獲利後，於 2022 年被 TikTok 合作夥伴 Collab 收購。

summary.en: A tech-enabled fulfillment provider for the Middle East and Africa.
summary.zh: 一個為中東與非洲提供科技驅動物流的服務商。

highlight.en: It warehouses local merchants' stock and delivers their orders directly to customers through a network of last-mile delivery partners.
highlight.zh: 為本地商家倉儲庫存，並透過最後一哩配送夥伴網路將訂單直接送達顧客。

summary.en: Connecting top Middle East talent to global tech jobs.
summary.zh: 將頂尖中東人才連結至全球科技職缺。

highlight.en: It identifies the region's top software engineers and offers a last-mile solution of interview preparation and referrals to help them land global tech jobs.
highlight.zh: 找出該地區頂尖的軟體工程師，並提供面試準備與推薦的「最後一哩」方案，助其取得全球科技職缺。

summary.en: Plaid for Africa, but better.
summary.zh: 非洲版的 Plaid，但更出色。

highlight.en: It lets companies access data from their customers' bank accounts and debit money directly from those same accounts.
highlight.zh: 讓企業存取客戶銀行帳戶的資料，並直接從這些帳戶扣款。

summary.en: GreaseBoss verifies that industrial machinery is greased correctly.
summary.zh: GreaseBoss 驗證工業機械是否正確上潤滑油。

highlight.en: Its hardware and software verify correct machine greasing, the number-one cause of machinery failure, which costs industry $21bn per year.
highlight.zh: 其硬體與軟體驗證機械是否正確潤滑——潤滑不當是機械故障的頭號原因，每年讓產業損失 210 億美元。

summary.en: Electricity price forecasts for energy storage, EV charging and more.
summary.zh: 為儲能、電動車充電等提供電價預測。

highlight.en: It uses machine learning to accurately forecast electricity prices; live customers including Enel use its software to improve revenue by millions per year.
highlight.zh: 運用機器學習準確預測電價，包含 Enel 在內的客戶使用其軟體每年提升數百萬美元的營收。

summary.en: Data-driven embedded financial services for gig workers.
summary.zh: 為零工工作者提供資料驅動的嵌入式金融服務。

highlight.en: It lets Egyptian businesses offer loans and virtual bank accounts to unbanked workers via their apps, like a trucking marketplace advancing drivers' earnings.
highlight.zh: 讓埃及企業能透過自家應用程式，為無銀行帳戶的工作者提供貸款與虛擬銀行帳戶，例如一家貨運市集為司機提供收入預支。

summary.en: Government-funded online addiction treatment via telemedicine.
summary.zh: 以遠距醫療提供的政府資助線上成癮治療。

highlight.en: Partnering with local governments, its medication-and-counseling approach improves outcomes for over 70% of patients and reduces overdoses by 80%.
highlight.zh: 與地方政府合作，其結合藥物與諮商的療法可改善逾 70% 病患的成效，並使藥物過量減少 80%。
